---
id: get-device-definitions
title: "Query Device Model Definition"
description: "Get detailed model definition for specified devices, including device types, an endpoint list, property lists, etc."
sidebar_label: "Query Device Model Definition"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Query Device Model Definition"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices/definitions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get detailed model definition for specified devices, including device types, an endpoint list, property lists, etc.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"deviceIds","in":"query","required":true,"description":"Device ID list. Example: deviceIds=xx1,xx2 or deviceIds=xx1&deviceIds=xx2","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  label={undefined}

success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","name","deviceTypesList","endpoints"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID"},"gatewayId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"The gateway ID to which this device is bound.\nIf `gatewayId` equals `deviceId`, it indicates that this device is itself a gateway.\nIf `gatewayId` is `null` or an empty string, it means this device is a directly connected gateway without subdevices or a third-party integrated device.\n"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Device name"},"deviceTypesList":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"Device type list"},"endpoints":{"type":"array","description":"Endpoint
